app.name: glossa-morpho
app.subtitle: Localization string workbench with multi-project tabs, locale dependency chains and multi-format resources.
labels.searchFiles: Search file name, path or format
labels.searchEntries: Search key, upstream text or current translation
descriptions.bulkReplace: Run batch find/replace on current translations; this can later be connected to a Rust transaction command.
descriptions.createProject: Locales are modeled as dependencies, not just source vs target. Think A → B → C.
descriptions.openProject: Opens a mock / demo project for now; later this can connect to a real file picker.
descriptions.localeChain: Use a tree-style dependency graph to express translation order; one locale can derive from another.
empty.title: No project is open yet
empty.description: Create a starter project or open a demo project to keep building the app.
empty.noSelectionDescription: The Inspector on the right is ready for editing, candidates, history and validation.
home.title: Home
home.description: The Home tab is the fixed entry on the far left of the tab bar for app info, recent projects and new project creation.
home.newProjectDescription: Create a starter localization project with a locale dependency chain.
home.openProjectDescription: Open an existing project and continue in multi-tab editing mode.
home.recentDescription: Recently opened projects are shown here.
descriptions.findReplace: Open a modal to search, filter and narrow the current entry list.
labels.commandPlaceholder: Search commands, projects or recent files
settings.title: Preferences
descriptions.replace: Replace matching text in the current project translation set.
descriptions.projectMetadata: Review the current project path, locale dependency chain and summary metrics.
feedback.notWiredYet: This action is not wired yet.
feedback.useTextSelection: Use the active text field or wire native edit commands later.
help.licenseDescription: Review the current license placeholder for this starter application.
descriptions.saveAsProject: Save the active project to a different .gmproj path.
descriptions.importResources: Import JSON, YAML, or Properties resources into the active project.
descriptions.importFilesHint: Choose one or more source files, then review the normalized preview before importing.
descriptions.importEmpty: No files selected yet. Use Add Files... to choose resources from the system file picker.
descriptions.importHasConflicts: Conflicts were detected. Review them before committing the import.
descriptions.importReady: The preview is ready to be imported into the active project.
descriptions.exportResources: Export the active project files to a folder using the current logical paths and formats.
descriptions.keySegmentationProfiles: Comma-separated profiles such as dot, camel or a custom regex identifier.
descriptions.exportSingleFile: Export one project resource as a concrete file in its native format.
descriptions.createFile: Create an empty resource file inside the current project and locale chain.
descriptions.logicalPath: This is the internal project path used for import/export and file grouping.
labels.createLinkedDescendants: Create linked files for downstream locales
descriptions.renameFile: Rename the current resource file and optionally apply the new logical path to related locale siblings.
descriptions.renameRelatedFiles: When enabled, related locale files in the same resource group are renamed using the same pattern.
descriptions.deleteFile: Delete the selected resource file and optionally remove related locale siblings with their entries.
descriptions.batchExport: Export multiple resource files to a target directory while preserving their logical paths.
empty.noFileSelectedTitle: Select a file to work on
empty.noFileSelectedDescription: Choose a resource file from the Project Files panel to view and edit its entries.
empty.noEntriesForFile: This file has no entries yet. Create or import entries to start editing.
